description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy shaped like a rabbit, featuring a soft, rounded body and limbs. Its fur is a light cream color with subtle grayish shading on the tips of the ears and limbs, giving it a gently worn, well-loved appearance. The head is large and round with two long, floppy ears, one of which stands more upright while the other flops to the side. The face is simple and endearing, with small, round black eyes, a tiny pink nose, and a stitched mouth. The arms and legs are short and stubby, attached to a plump torso, and the overall form is cuddly and inviting. There are no visible accessories, clothing, or branding on the toy, and its surface appears soft and matte.
description: A soft, cream-colored plush rabbit with floppy ears, simple stitched facial features, and a cuddly, rounded body. The toy has subtle gray shading on its ears and limbs, giving it a gently worn look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rabbit's face, both floppy ears, and outstretched arms with visible gray shading on the ear tips.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the toy's profile, rounded head, and stacked body segments, with minimal facial detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the head, ears, and body, with the limbs and tail area visible but no facial features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the profile of the head, body, and limbs, with the other ear more prominently visible.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and gentle, with small round black eyes, a tiny pink nose, and a simple stitched mouth. There are no eyebrows or other expressive features, giving it a calm and friendly appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms slightly outstretched and one ear flopping to the side while the other stands more upright.
